items.title: Jim Cramer Highlights Boeing as a Beneficiary of Trade War
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the stocks in focus in the game plan Jim Cramer shared. Cramer highlighted why the Charitable Trust holds the stock. He said: “Then there’s Boeing, which, after taking a non-cash charge or two for whatever issue might be on the table, should offer a restrained set of positives […]
